citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at about 11:40am on
5/11/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee. A person at the facility said the licensee was not there and
would not be available for the remainder of the day. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in
enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at about 11:40am on 
5/11/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee. A person at the facility said the licensee was not there and 
would not be available for the remainder of the day. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for 
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in 
enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
